description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that caches the Maven repository at .m2/repository, uses the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service, and defines variables DOCKER_DRIVER, MAVEN_CLI_OPTS, MAVEN_OPTS, and SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE. Define two stages: build and package. In the build stage add a maven-build job that runs on the maven:3-jdk-8 image, executes mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS package -B, and uploads the resulting target/*.jar files as an artifact. In the package stage add a docker-build job that runs on docker:latest, runs docker build -t registry.gitlab.com/mayermic/smartvineyards-dhms ., then docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com, and finally docker push registry.gitlab.com/mayermic/smartvineyards-dhms to publish the image to the GitLab Container Registry.
